hero.question: Manchester City FC vs. Liverpool FC: O/U 3.5
hero.prob_take: An 82.5% probability on the Over means the crowd is pricing this as a near-certainty, betting that two of the most attack-minded teams in the Premier League will combine for 4+ goals in what's historically their most explosive fixture. The 42.5-point surge in 24 hours reeks of late money chasing narrative rather than edge, and with both teams' defenses healthier than they were a month ago, you're getting paid nothing for what's actually a coin flip.

daily_take.headline: Man City-Liverpool Over Explodes 42 Points, Market Finally Pricing Reality
daily_take.deck: The over 3.5 goals jumped 42.5 points to 82.5% in 24 hours on $266K volume, a massive repricing that signals sharp money finally waking up. These teams combine for 3.1 goals per game on average this season, so 82.5% is overheated. Fade the herd: either wait for a pullback or go small on the under at better odds.
